[2018-04-18 15:51] kaelii: SDR "Having X vs not having X" evaluation's are under the assumption that there is a 0 cost to have X.
[2018-04-18 15:51] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): Is having units that cost a type of resource to buy and another type of resource to activate not a thing?
[2018-04-18 15:52] kaelii: Infusion Grid costs blue, uses red to activate
[2018-04-18 15:52] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): Awesome, tomorrow is gonna be sweet!
[2018-04-18 15:52] darkeisbein: costs blue but costs green to click
[2018-04-18 15:52] kaelii: Synth does theoretically feed itself though
[2018-04-18 15:52] supergreyman (Greyman): And a bunch of other units
[2018-04-18 15:53] darkeisbein: and plasmaifier costs gold but costs drones to click
[2018-04-18 15:54] supergreyman (Greyman): That sac thingy, and Flame Animus.
[2018-04-18 15:54] kaelii: Do we count Auride and Thermite?
[2018-04-18 15:55] crash_overlord: Flame animus doesn't get clicked
[2018-04-18 15:56] darkeisbein: Steelsplitter costs :Blue: but costs :Click: to activate :LongNoseLiar:
[2018-04-18 15:56] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): ferritin sac also doesn't cost anything to click
[2018-04-18 15:57] kaelii: Mini-challenge for the day: Design a monocolor unit whose click uses the remaining two colors
[2018-04-18 15:57] darkeisbein: also Odin costs no steelsplitters to buy but steelsplitters to click
[2018-04-18 15:57] supergreyman (Greyman): Go win the current design challenge to make it official!
[2018-04-18 15:58] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): @Kaelii I used my two units for the day :FeelsBadMan: Maybe a Reddit threat? :POGGERS:
[2018-04-18 15:58] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): are steelsplitters the most abused units after drones?
[2018-04-18 15:58] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): odins, drakes, and manticores all use them
[2018-04-18 15:58] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): (physically abused that is)
[2018-04-18 15:59] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): is any other unit consumed by 2 different units?
[2018-04-18 15:59] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): drake and steelforge
[2018-04-18 15:59] darkeisbein: steelforge, drake and grenade mech eat blastforges
[2018-04-18 15:59] crash_overlord: gmech drake steelforge
[2018-04-18 15:59] darkeisbein: only odin and manticore eat splitters
[2018-04-18 15:59] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): What if Apollo gave 3 Attack, Pay 2 Attack to Snipe, cost 18BBB.
[2018-04-18 16:00] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): odins eat a LOT of splitters though :p
[2018-04-18 16:00] supergreyman (Greyman): @StrShPlyr We talked about that already?
[2018-04-18 16:00] kristian1103 (Arkanishu): Which it usually does
[2018-04-18 16:00] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): do you think a drake eats more blastforges or an odin eats more splitters on average?
[2018-04-18 16:01] darkeisbein: grenade mech eats a lot of blastforges
[2018-04-18 16:01] supergreyman (Greyman): Odin is bigger so it needs to eat more.
[2018-04-18 16:01] crash_overlord: It doesn't matter how good/bad it is it's worse design because it makes apollo good as a unit in all sets you can buy it.
[2018-04-18 16:02] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Not efficient attack.
[2018-04-18 16:02] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): Here's my design for the day. I was thinking about it on the train
[2018-04-18 16:02] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): Gauss Panzer (5 :Gold: :Green: :Green: :Blue: :Blue: 1 Supply) 5 :Health: :Prompt: 

As an additional cost to buy Gauss Panzer, consume 2 Gauss Cannons.

At the start of your turn, gain :Attack: :Attack: :Attack: 

Like a Green/Blue Centurion-lite with more attack and weird setup cost
[2018-04-18 16:02] crash_overlord: it's 4 damage vs walls
[2018-04-18 16:03] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): maybe prompt makes it too strong idk
[2018-04-18 16:03] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): I mean the unclicked.
[2018-04-18 16:03] supergreyman (Greyman): Better than Colossal even?
[2018-04-18 16:04] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Gauss Panzer is weak.
[2018-04-18 16:04] supergreyman (Greyman): I think it's better than Colossus.
[2018-04-18 16:04] .bky_1556 (bky): Clunk aside, you're paying about 2.3 gold for the third attack.
[2018-04-18 16:04] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): 1 Attack, 2 Absorb over Wall.
[2018-04-18 16:05] crash_overlord: Anyways. It's worse design because if apollo is good its now better and if apollo is bad it's now better.
[2018-04-18 16:05] .bky_1556 (bky): So it's definitely worth buying as an ematrix-plus.
[2018-04-18 16:05] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): if it's the best absorber in the set i think it almost always gets bought, and the difficult purchase condition makes it fun imo
[2018-04-18 16:05] crash_overlord: Making the decision to buy apollo is one of the more interesting choices and you're removing it
[2018-04-18 16:06] .bky_1556 (bky): It's even worth buying 2 gauss cannons for instead of more efficient attackers.
[2018-04-18 16:06] crash_overlord: Ya I like it vanitas. Not sure if it's too cheap

[2018-04-18 16:06] supergreyman (Greyman): Actually, if you compare it to Feral Warden, it makes it look a bit weaker.
[2018-04-18 16:06] crash_overlord: Probably not cause gauss cannons are garbage
[2018-04-18 16:06] supergreyman (Greyman): Because you're paying GBB for extra 2 health.
[2018-04-18 16:06] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): you can also get it on low econ, which i think gives it an interesting niche as a cent alternative

[2018-04-18 16:07] crash_overlord: compare it to ematrix

[2018-04-18 16:07] .bky_1556 (bky): The gauss cannons are cheap enough, because they come with a tarsier-attack between them when you build the green-doped Ematrix.
[2018-04-18 16:07] crash_overlord: but costs 2 gauss cannons to have been bought
[2018-04-18 16:07] crash_overlord: It's stronger than matrix but more awkward to build
[2018-04-18 16:07] crash_overlord: Also way more breachvulnrable
[2018-04-18 16:07] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): But XX, pay XX to Snipe?
[2018-04-18 16:07] .bky_1556 (bky): Or to put it another way, gauss cannons are at most 1 gold overpriced.
[2018-04-18 16:08] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): If it makes gauss cannons less bad, i think that's interesting, too
[2018-04-18 16:08] supergreyman (Greyman): Oh right, I forgot that it's :Health: not :Fragile:
[2018-04-18 16:08] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): like some openings would like to build gauss cannons, but since they're overcosted they're skipped
[2018-04-18 16:09] kristian1103 (Arkanishu): Well you'd never get more than 1
[2018-04-18 16:09] crash_overlord: well if blue and green are free it's a 5Gold attacker :LongNoseLiar:
[2018-04-18 16:09] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): i made it supply 1 because of gauss fab :p
[2018-04-18 16:09] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): It's pretty low costed.
[2018-04-18 16:09] .bky_1556 (bky): You'd get a second very rarely as a tech sink, if gauss cannons are the best BG attacker.
[2018-04-18 16:10] crash_overlord: You'd get multiples with plasmafier
[2018-04-18 16:10] crash_overlord: Well you'd only have 5 drones and no wall supply left
[2018-04-18 16:11] crash_overlord: Tbh not sure it gets bought cause it's so breach vulnerable :monkaS:
[2018-04-18 16:11] kristian1103 (Arkanishu): I'd rather have 2 bp cannons than losing 3 atk on defense
[2018-04-18 16:11] crash_overlord: Unless it means you can shoot your plasma 1 more time and kill 1 shadowfang + wall instead of doing 2 damage
[2018-04-18 16:12] .bky_1556 (bky): Or you could use it to give your gauss cannons gold armor.
[2018-04-18 16:12] crash_overlord: Prompt golden armor :monkaS:
[2018-04-18 16:12] crash_overlord: Your opponent damages 2 different gauss cannons down to 1 hp
[2018-04-18 16:13] crash_overlord: How would you decide which to sacc
[2018-04-18 16:13] crash_overlord: would it just auto sacc the lowest hp ones 🤔
[2018-04-18 16:13] .bky_1556 (bky): Yep, shalev says always sac the lowest hp ones.
[2018-04-18 16:14] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): yeah that's where shalev comes in handy :p
[2018-04-18 16:14] crash_overlord: Shalev such a handy guy
[2018-04-18 16:14] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Apollo buff Turn XX Click pay XX and Snipe 3?
[2018-04-18 16:14] kristian1103 (Arkanishu): Crash btw no stream today?
[2018-04-18 16:15] crash_overlord: Ya taking a day off. Though I don't think that's game design 🤔
[2018-04-18 16:15] .bky_1556 (bky): It's very rare that 2 attack is worth more than snipe 3.
[2018-04-18 16:15] crash_overlord: In otherwords, never :monkaS:
[2018-04-18 16:16] .bky_1556 (bky): Aegis-Xaetron defense with no snipable attackers.
[2018-04-18 16:16] crash_overlord: Super edge case scenarios that make the unit very slightly better are not worth complicating the unit
[2018-04-18 16:16] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): Thanks for feedback on my design all ❤
[2018-04-18 16:16] crash_overlord: And on that note, why are you trying to buff apollo :NotLikeThis:
[2018-04-18 16:16] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): It's not complicated.
[2018-04-18 16:17] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): What if apollo was 30BBBB and sniped all units 3hp and under?
[2018-04-18 16:17] kristian1103 (Arkanishu): Apollo is trash usually
[2018-04-18 16:17] .bky_1556 (bky): But I feel like the strat of forcing Apollo snipe only bad targets is interesting and should be encouraged.
[2018-04-18 16:17] supergreyman (Greyman): @VanitasCabal Too OP
[2018-04-18 16:17] crash_overlord: I'd want apollo reworked, not strictly buffed.

--- Thread (29 messages, 2018-04-18) ---
[2018-04-18 16:52] http404error: Cool designs, folks!
[2018-04-18 16:54] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): @http404error opinion on Shell Refinator?
[2018-04-18 16:55] http404error: On the topic of design space, I think it's not very helpful to compare Prismata to magic, and I also don't think it's very important or useful to prioritize making new mechanics
[2018-04-18 16:57] http404error: For instance, note that new units released tend to not make huge waves, and instead use the existing game mechanics for the most part
[2018-04-18 16:57] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): About giving enemy red tempo.
[2018-04-18 16:58] supergreyman (Greyman): I think all these unit design contests show that there are some neat ideas you can still come up with the existing mechanics.
[2018-04-18 16:59] Deleted User (Deleted User): but eventually the lack of new mechanics will cause the game to become stale, which will cause some players to get bored and leave
[2018-04-18 16:59] supergreyman (Greyman): There will be new mechanics.
[2018-04-18 17:00] http404error: I don't think staleness is as near as you think

[2018-04-18 18:22] supergreyman (Greyman): Ok, got an idea.

Gauss Experiment (10GGGGGB, 1 supply) 7 :Fragile: 
Blocker, Prompt, Fragile
Start of turn: Construct 3 Barriers and lose 1 :Fragile: 
Click: Sacrifice Gauss Experiment to gain :Attack: for each remaining :Fragile:
[2018-04-18 18:24] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): Sorry, but what is 'X'?
[2018-04-18 18:24] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Uh that's a lot of shock?
[2018-04-18 18:25] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): ah, I see. Thanks for clearing tha tup. that's a pretty intersting concept. seems too strong?
[2018-04-18 18:25] supergreyman (Greyman): I was thinking.....9GGGG for 6 attacks shouldn't be that OP...?
[2018-04-18 18:25] tophwells (Toph): I like the idea of losing :Fragile:  per turn as a form of Lifespan.
[2018-04-18 18:26] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): 21 soak and 6 threat
[2018-04-18 18:27] supergreyman (Greyman): I think the price is off.
[2018-04-18 18:27] supergreyman (Greyman): Just throwing in a random number. 😄
[2018-04-18 18:29] tophwells (Toph): It's hard for me to value it because it does 3 things. Quite a lot of moving parts.
[2018-04-18 18:30] supergreyman (Greyman): Probably too efficient if you wait for 1 turn to have 3 Barriers and 6HP soak for 9GGGG plus threat.
[2018-04-18 18:30] tophwells (Toph): that kind of threat seems a bit off-colour in Green?
[2018-04-18 18:31] tophwells (Toph): I like units that make Barriers every turn though. It's a good mechanic.
[2018-04-18 18:31] crash_overlord: It fits really well into the gambit reddit design threat
[2018-04-18 18:31] crash_overlord: since you'd gambit vs it very often
[2018-04-18 18:31] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Yeah, if it gave charges
[2018-04-18 18:31] supergreyman (Greyman): Guess I have to throw in a blue cost
[2018-04-18 18:31] wilson0862 (Wilson): Wincer has more threat and is green. :LongNoseLiar:
[2018-04-18 18:31] crash_overlord: But it's still too agressively costed
[2018-04-18 18:31] tophwells (Toph): Green threat makes Gauss Charges.
[2018-04-18 18:33] supergreyman (Greyman): ~~9GGGGB should probably do it.~~ Meh, I hate pricing things.
[2018-04-18 18:33] tophwells (Toph): Why Prompt? I can't see when you'd be happy to block with this on the turn it comes out.
[2018-04-18 18:34] tophwells (Toph): Every :Fragile: it loses now is 3 Barriers further down the line.
[2018-04-18 18:35] supergreyman (Greyman): I think if you don't give it prompt, it would lose 1 HP the turn it comes out, so it would technically be 6HP once it finishes construction.
[2018-04-18 18:35] supergreyman (Greyman): I'm trying to avoid that sort of situation. 😛
[2018-04-18 18:37] supergreyman (Greyman): I think that's the only flaw thing about losing/gaining HP at start of turn effect.
[2018-04-18 18:37] supergreyman (Greyman): Xaetron nicely avoids that. And Mahar starts with max HP.

[2018-04-18 20:42] kaelii: Chronoforge: (10 :Gold: :Green: :Green: :Green: :Green: , supply 1) :Fragile: 10
4 :Lifespan: 
At the start of your turn: Construct an Isochronos.
:Click:, ? :Gold: , :Red: :Blue: , Reduce all your currently :Exhaust: units :Exhaust: by 1, to a minimum of 1, then :Exhaust: 1 (Should synch up next iso it makes with the now about to fire iso's, and delays its lifespan count down so it only ever makes 4 isochronos)
[2018-04-18 20:45] tophwells (Toph): it's a faster Gauss Fabricator with an extra ability, so it should probably cost slightly more
[2018-04-18 20:50] tophwells (Toph): so its click ability synchronises all the Isoes it just built?
[2018-04-18 20:51] tophwells (Toph): it has Exhaust synergy, but there really aren't that many Exhaust units in the game
[2018-04-18 20:52] tophwells (Toph): immolite, scorchilla, wincer, chrono filter, and iso kronus.
[2018-04-18 20:53] tophwells (Toph): so its ability to refresh other units seems like it won't come up very often
[2018-04-18 20:53] kaelii: It's a weaker gauss fab if you don't have BR up because you don't synch the chronos making it only 4 continuous attack after 4 turns. If you have RB it can setup synched isos.
[2018-04-18 20:54] tophwells (Toph): Iso Kronus produces 2 attack every other turn. This would be 8 continuous attack after 4 turns.
[2018-04-18 20:54] kaelii: Iso 1 and 3 are synched, Iso 2 and 4 are synched by default.
[2018-04-18 20:55] kaelii: So 4 alternating attack and 4 alternating attack.
[2018-04-18 20:55] kaelii: Which is only 4 attack per turn.
[2018-04-18 20:55] kaelii: IF you synch them it becomes 8 attack every other turn.
[2018-04-18 20:56] tophwells (Toph): ... ok yeah you're right
[2018-04-18 20:56] tophwells (Toph): So it's half a Gauss Fabricator?
[2018-04-18 20:57] .bky_1556 (bky): It'd be better to give the fab itself exhaust.
[2018-04-18 20:57] .bky_1556 (bky): Produce 2 isos every 2 turns.
[2018-04-18 20:58] tophwells (Toph): I think the intent is that it normally produces out-of-phase Isoes, but you can pay extra for synched ones.
[2018-04-18 20:58] kaelii: I mean, if I just wanted an iso fab it would automatically give itself exhaust and then it really is just a reskinned gauss fab.
[2018-04-18 20:59] kaelii: I think it can be really spooky in an iso set because you can time its click to reduce just fired isos to fire again next turn.
[2018-04-18 21:00] tophwells (Toph): ooh, neat, clicking it effectively produces extra attack because of that.
[2018-04-18 21:01] kaelii: I'm not sure how many isos you need out to want to click it though -- as it is you probably just click it once to synch them all.
[2018-04-18 21:02] kaelii: I could make it more expensive and longer lifespan but that would probably start to get extreme.
[2018-04-18 21:03] tophwells (Toph): Why the RB tech cost to click it? That's a lot of tech. If you can afford to pay that and still do other things, you're probably overteched on the turns you don't click it.
[2018-04-18 21:04] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): That Chronoforge is pretty interesting. What would a similar unit, but one that does the reverse (add 1 :Exhaust:), look like?
[2018-04-18 21:07] kaelii: RB tech cost because I was trying to come up with a unit that was one color and used the other colors in its click, which isn't easy for obvious reasons. This cobbling kind of works but the click cost is kind of expensive despite being flavorful (chronofilter)
[2018-04-18 21:08] liadahlia (Lia): I don't quite understand the click ability
[2018-04-18 21:08] liadahlia (Lia): It reduces exhaust by 1, to a min of 1, then 2?
[2018-04-18 21:10] liadahlia (Lia): Also this unit is especially good with exhaust units on the set
[2018-04-18 21:10] liadahlia (Lia): Like scorch and wincer
[2018-04-18 21:10] kaelii: So all your currently exhausted units like scorchilla, chronofilter, isochronos with more than 1 exhaust, are ready sooner (doesn't reduce exhaust to 0 because that would make damage predictions super annoying/broken by mid turn activating scorchilla or something). Then it, itself gains exhaust and doesn't do anything for a few turns.
[2018-04-18 21:11] liadahlia (Lia): Oh so it won't produce iso when exhausted right?
[2018-04-18 21:11] kaelii: Which in base+this is limited to some of the iso's it produced already -- probably not worth the RB cost in which case it is a semi-slow but gold cheap source of 4 attack per turn.
[2018-04-18 21:12] liadahlia (Lia): In a set without exhaust units would you ever click this unit?
[2018-04-18 21:13] liadahlia (Lia): You'd be losing out on 1 iso if you click it on the last turn you can right?
[2018-04-18 21:13] kaelii: Before it makes the last iso, probably if you have BR
[2018-04-18 21:13] liadahlia (Lia): Doesn't units produce right before it dies?
[2018-04-18 21:13] liadahlia (Lia): I think oxides do that
[2018-04-18 21:13] kaelii: Exhausted units don't tick down lifespan until non-exhausted.
[2018-04-18 21:14] liadahlia (Lia): So you can click 4 times in total with this unit
[2018-04-18 21:14] liadahlia (Lia): I don't think we've ever had lifespan exhaust units
[2018-04-18 21:14] kaelii: You could click it 4 times but you'd get isos much slower and unless the timing is useful its not really helping you.
[2018-04-18 21:14] liadahlia (Lia): So is that something you come up with?
[2018-04-18 21:15] kaelii: Barriers off of Valky are lifespan but made with :Exhaust: 1 I believe.
[2018-04-18 21:15] darkeisbein: but the click is the only thing potentially valuable about the unit
[2018-04-18 21:15] liadahlia (Lia): It's a blue hourglass
[2018-04-18 21:16] liadahlia (Lia): It's certainly a weird interaction
[2018-04-18 21:18] darkeisbein: inflation says that chronoforge is just bad without the click ability
[2018-04-18 21:18] darkeisbein: at 1.3 inflation so it's getting worse at higher inflation
[2018-04-18 21:18] liadahlia (Lia): Probably can reduce the cost
[2018-04-18 21:18] liadahlia (Lia): I mean this unit is just worse than fab without the click

[2018-04-18 21:20] liadahlia (Lia): Attack with scorch, click this unit, this unit will be ready again when scorch is ready to attack
[2018-04-18 21:21] kaelii: I mean, it probably does disgusting things with even just iso sets because you can have 4-5 isos and then get double shot turns off your isos.

[2018-04-18 21:21] liadahlia (Lia): Scorchirilla :POGGERS:
